# Known migration drift — accepted 2026-07-07 (incident stabilization).
# Format: <Table> :: <prisma migrate diff summary line>, one per line.
# CI's "Check migration drift" step fails only on drift NOT listed here.
# When a catch-up migration resolves an item, DELETE its lines — the step
# reports resolved lines so this file shrinks honestly. Do not add new lines
# without understanding why the schema and migrations disagree.
#
# Inventory (see AGENTS.md / incident notes 2026-07-06):
# - ApiKey name/prefix/expiresAt: columns exist in schema, never migrated
# - Org stripeCustomerId unique: same
# - Claim/BookClaim embedding: stale legacy MiniLM columns, dropped from schema
# - HNSW indexes on vector columns + expression indexes (text, searchVector):
#   real objects Prisma's DSL cannot express — permanent residents here
# - updatedAt/searchVector defaults: Prisma @updatedAt / generated-column
#   semantics live outside migration SQL
# - MemberIdeology updatedAt (added 2026-07-22): B11-2's hand-written migration
#   declared DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; the model uses @updatedAt (no default).
#   Same permanent class as Claim/Collection/Org above. This single line kept
#   CI red from Jul 15-22.
ApiKey :: [+] Added column `expiresAt`
ApiKey :: [+] Added column `name`
ApiKey :: [+] Added column `prefix`
BookClaim :: [-] Removed column `embedding`
Claim :: [-] Removed index on columns (embedding)
Claim :: [-] Removed index on columns (text)
Claim :: [-] Removed index on columns (searchVector)
Claim :: [-] Removed column `embedding`
Claim :: [*] Altered column `searchVector` (default changed from `Some(DbGenerated(Some("to_tsvector('english'::regconfig, COALESCE(text, ''::text))")))` to `None`)
Claim :: [*] Altered column `updatedAt` (default changed from `Some(Now)` to `None`)
MemberIdeology :: [*] Altered column `updatedAt` (default changed from `Some(Now)` to `None`)
ClaimEmbedding :: [-] Removed index on columns (embedding)
Collection :: [*] Altered column `updatedAt` (default changed from `Some(Now)` to `None`)
Org :: [*] Altered column `updatedAt` (default changed from `Some(Now)` to `None`)
Org :: [+] Added unique index on columns (stripeCustomerId)
TrajectorySearchDoc :: [-] Removed index on columns (embedding)
